thesis: Commvault has successfully transformed from a legacy on-premise backup vendor into a subscription-first, cloud-native SaaS provider. FY2026 revenue of $1,184M (+19% YoY) and total ARR of $1,122M (+21% YoY) demonstrate strong execution. However, the stock has rallied 81% from its 52-week low and now trades with an RSI of 76.5, indicating overbought conditions. FY2027 guidance for $1.30–$1.31B revenue and 20.5% non-GAAP EBIT margin is encouraging, but the recent run-up leaves little margin of safety. We assign a HOLD rating: the business is executing well, but risk/reward at current levels is no longer asymmetric.

drivers: Margin expansion to 22–24% EBIT as SaaS scale effects kick in
SaaS growth sustains 40%+ and becomes majority of revenue
AI security tailwinds drive premium pricing and multiple expansion to 6.5–7x EV/Revenue
Cyber resilience demand accelerates on rising ransomware incidents

risks: Multiple compression to 3.5–4x EV/Revenue on margin miss or growth deceleration
Competitive pressure from well-funded rivals Rubrik, Veeam, and Cohesity
Macro IT spending slowdown lengthens sales cycles and compresses ARR growth
Valuation risk: 81% rally from 52W low and RSI 76.5 leave little room for disappointment

base_case.assumptions: FY2027 guidance is met: revenue $1.30–$1.31B, EBIT margin ~20.5%. Stock trades at ~5x EV/Revenue, tracking fundamentals with limited alpha. SaaS mix continues to improve but no dramatic acceleration.

catalysts.event: Q1 FY2027 Earnings — first read on FY2027 guidance execution and margin trajectory
Q2 FY2027 Earnings — SaaS revenue growth and ARR momentum update
Q3 FY2027 Earnings — midpoint check on full-year margin expansion target

key_risks: Execution risk on FY2027 EBIT margin expansion to 20.5%
Competitive pressure from Rubrik, Veeam, and Cohesity in enterprise data protection
Macro IT spending slowdown impacting enterprise software sales cycles
Valuation risk after 81% rally from 52-week low with RSI at 76.5
Transition risk if mix shifts back toward lower-margin perpetual licenses
